name: CheckSmart
description_short: Phoenix, AZ CheckSmart location at 7710 W Lower Buckeye Rd offers check cashing, payday loans, and financial services Mon–Sat.
description_long:
CheckSmart's Phoenix location at 7710 W Lower Buckeye Rd Ste 100 serves the West Phoenix area with check-cashing and financial services. The standalone storefront is accessible Mon–Sat, with extended hours on Monday and Friday (9 AM–7 PM), shorter hours Tue–Thu (9 AM–6 PM), and Saturday morning service (10 AM–4 PM). The Phoenix store is closed Sundays.

The Phoenix, AZ CheckSmart branch offers check cashing, payday loans, installment loans, and money transfers. Walk in with your valid government ID and proof of income. For questions about current rates, fees, or application status, call +1 623-936-9400. Staff can discuss loan eligibility and next steps during your visit.

For Phoenix residents needing quick cash or short-term financing, this Lower Buckeye location offers a walk-in alternative to online lending. Bring your state ID, pay stub or income verification, and banking information. CheckSmart specializes in serving people who may not qualify for traditional bank loans.
address: 7710 W Lower Buckeye Rd Ste 100, Phoenix, AZ 85043

company_info.headquarters: 7710 W Lower Buckeye Rd Ste 100, Phoenix, AZ 85043

pros: Extended hours including early opening (8 AM) and late closing (8 PM on Fridays) for working customers
Multiple financial services available at single location: check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill pay, gift card exchange, and debit card issuance
Online appointment scheduling available to reduce in-store wait times
12+ Ohio locations including multiple Columbus-area branches for convenience
Same-day or rapid lending decisions with quick funding process for approved applicants
Accepts third-party lending products, expanding options beyond single lender
Accepts Green Dot Visa Debit Cards, providing unbanked/underbanked customers payment infrastructure
cons: Loans provided by unaffiliated third-party lenders, not directly by CheckSmart—rates, terms, and approval criteria are opaque and not disclosed on website
No APR, fee, or rate information provided—customers cannot comparison shop before visiting
Storefront-based only; no online lending application or remote funding options
Described as 'short-term lending' with no specification of loan amounts, repayment terms, or affordability safeguards
Limited transparency about alternative lending products or whether rates comply with state usury laws
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked Ohio residents needing immediate check cashing, money orders, or wire transfer services
Customers needing multiple financial services (lending + cash access) in a single location without navigating multiple providers
Working individuals with limited daytime availability who need extended evening or weekend hours
Borrowers with poor credit or thin credit files who may not qualify for traditional bank loans
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best for Ohio residents needing immediate cash access through check cashing, money orders, or wire transfers combined with fast short-term lending at a single location. The primary caveat is that actual loan terms, APRs, fees, and approval criteria are controlled by unaffiliated third-party lenders and are not disclosed on CheckSmart's website, making it impossible to assess affordability or compare rates before visiting a store.
services: Short-term loans through third-party unaffiliated lenders
Green Dot Visa Debit Card issuance
Proof of income/employment verification for loan qualification
Customer service and financial counseling at point of sale
meta_description: CheckSmart at 7710 W Lower Buckeye Rd, Phoenix, AZ. Check cashing, payday loans, installment loans, and money transfers.
